title: Discovering novel genetic polymorphism using VIROME

steps: Go to VIROME web application . a
Enter username and password to authenticate into the application. a
Name the search. a Adding a name will help for bookmarking to go back and see it at a later time.
Click on "Download Search Sequences". a Can be found in the bottom left hand corner of the page.
Select data types for download. a
Once prompted to save the file, do not change the file name!
Double click the file to unzip it.
Use Excel pivot table to summarize data. a
Import fasta file into Geneious sequence analysis program. a Geneious 9.0.4 Windows or Mac OSX 10.6 Geneious
Assemble reads into full length genes. a
BLAST putative full length comparative sequences. a
For full video tutorial see guidelines. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jj3KP5ri7mY
creator: Bonnie L Hurwitz
